title: K-200 Systems Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Systems Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-484-A. Revision: A. Type: procedure. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2024-01-06. Last modified: 2024-03-15. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1089, P-1082.
